calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Opening Brief Ofr Issuance Of Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Denied

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Opening Brief Ofr Issuance Of Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Sep-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 318
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PETER R. OSINOFF OF BONNE BRIDGES, TEL. NO. (213) 480-1900 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. DAVID CARR, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5538 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER A TABRIZ'S Hearing On Petitioner Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is continued to September 26, 2014 and deemed submitted on that date after receipt of the court of the Reply. Further briefing on the issue on the effect if any of the document that was granted by the court on Judicial Notice and the distinction between the scope of practice governed by the statute and the standard of practice as it relates to this case. Brief to be filed by September 12, 2014 and Reply to be filed by September 26, 2014. Each side to submit proposed order by way of e-mail to Dept318@sftc.org. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 = (302/MJM)
